THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT CLAIMANT NEED NOT PRODUCE HIS TAX RETURNS. THE DA'S OFFICE IS TO SERVE NOTICE OF THIS RULING ON CLAIMANT. RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY FEBRUARY 17, 2017. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY REBECCA D. WAGNER OF THE SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY TEL NO. 415-553-4997 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING- PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES.

Appearances: Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the District Attorney (415.553.4997) for petitioner and moving party; No other appearances.

Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: No opposition filed; motion granted with the exception that claimant need not produce his tax returns. The DA's office is to serve notice of this ruling on claimant. Responses to be served by February 17, 2017. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
